title: Giant Foil Number 0 Balloon - 86 cm - Matte Nude Colour - 1 Count (Pack of 1)
features: Number balloon measures 86 cm when fully inflated (ships flat)
Can be filled with helium or air via hand pump, and is self-sealing
Combine with other number balloons to celebrate a birthday or anniversary
Combine with other nude colour party supplies from Unique Party
description: Product Description Celebrate a milestone event in eye-catching style with this Giant Matte Nude Foil Number Balloon. Featuring a delicate nude "0" shape, this large foil balloon can be combined with other number balloons to add charming colour to a milestone birthday party or to an anniversary event. Tie it indoors to a chair for a quick and easy stand-alone decoration, or outside your house or venue to help guests locate the party. This helium-quality balloon will also look great with assorted latex balloons, curling ribbon and a balloon weight as part of a festive balloon bouquet or table centrepiece. Use the tabs on the top, bottom and sides of the balloon to hang it from the ceiling if air-filled, to anchor it down when filled with helium, or to tie numbers together to create a custom number. Safety Warning Warning: Choking Hazard. Not suitable for children under 3 years due to small parts. Warning: Do not use near overhead powerlines or during thunderstorms. Caution: Not intended for release. Dispose of properly. Never use metallic ribbon with balloon. This balloon may conduct electricity. Misuse can cause personal injury. Attach a non-metallic ribbon and balloon weight.
